summary: Alley Boss engages in a high-stakes combat sequence against elite guild members, including a warrior named Chen and a pair of synchronized fighters. Despite being outnumbered by Level 150 players, Alley Boss utilizes powerful skills and his pet to turn the tide of the battle. The chapter concludes with the revelation that the confrontation was orchestrated by the guildmaster Tian Hu, setting the stage for a conflict between him and Alley Boss.
key_moments: Alley Boss defeats Chen in a single blow using an enhanced sword technique.
Alley Boss battles two synchronized level 150 players who utilize status effects like fire and ice.
Alley Boss is rescued by his pet, Tangy, and successfully counterattacks Rin, uncovering a plot by the guild leader Tian Hu.
